user.title: Set up Euskalmet
user.description: Enter your access details. In the next step you can choose a weather station and review the measurements it provides.

station.title: Choose a weather station
station.description: {station_count} active weather stations were found. Each option shows how many measurements it provides and which ones are missing. Tide gauges and stations without weather data are excluded.

confirm.title: Confirm incomplete station
confirm.description:
The station **{station}** provides: {available}.

It does not provide: **{missing}**.

Only sensors for available measurements will be created. Select Submit to add it anyway.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Euskalmet. Try again.
error.cannot_determine_location: The selected station could not be associated with an Euskalmet forecast location.
error.cannot_load_stations: Could not load the official station catalogue.
error.no_compatible_stations: No weather stations publishing a supported measurement were found.
error.station_not_available: The selected station is no longer available. Restart configuration.
